name: overlord
description: Open-source management and coordination layer for AI coding agents

scripts.install:all: yarn install && yarn --cwd webapp install && yarn --cwd desktop install && yarn --cwd database install
scripts.setup: yarn install && yarn build:prod && yarn db:start && yarn db:codegen && yarn install
scripts.new: rm -rf node_modules cli/node_modules webapp/node_modules rm -rf dist webapp/dist webapp/dist-server desktop/dist-electron && yarn install:all
scripts.cli:pack:prod: yarn cli:build:prod && yarn workspace open-overlord pack
scripts.cli:publish: yarn cli:build:prod && node scripts/with-prod-env.mjs yarn workspace open-overlord npm publish
scripts.db:start: node scripts/with-dev-env.mjs sh -c 'OVERLORD_SQLITE_PATH="$(tsx scripts/print-db-path.ts)" tsx database/src/launch-local.ts'
scripts.db:codegen: yarn db:start && kysely-codegen --dialect sqlite --url "$(tsx scripts/print-db-path.ts)" --out-file src/types/db.ts
scripts.desktop:build:prod: yarn webapp:build:prod && yarn server:build:prod && yarn workspace Overlord build
scripts.typecheck: yarn db:build:prod && yarn auth:build:prod && yarn automations:build:prod && yarn typecheck:root && yarn typecheck:cli && yarn typecheck:webapp
scripts.test: yarn check:native:fix && yarn db:build:prod && yarn auth:build:prod && yarn automations:build:prod && yarn test:root && yarn test:auth && yarn test:automations && yarn test:cli && yarn test:webapp
scripts.test:cli: node scripts/with-ovld-home.mjs yarn workspace open-overlord test
scripts.check: yarn lint && yarn typecheck && yarn test
scripts.build:prod: yarn db:build:prod && yarn auth:build:prod && yarn automations:build:prod && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && yarn cli:build:prod && yarn webapp:build:prod
scripts.ovld:dev: node scripts/with-dev-env.mjs yarn cli:build:prod && node scripts/with-dev-env.mjs node cli/bin/ovld.mjs
